name: Day of Arafah
description: Fasting on the Day of Arafah expiates the sins of the past year and the coming year.

name: Eid al-Adha
description: The festival of sacrifice and obedience.

name: Islamic New Year
description: Beginning of the new Hijri year (1447 AH).

name: Day of Ashura
description: Fasting on the day of Ashura expiates the sins of the past year.
